goal: Close aeiouboy/hr#53 — ESS Self-Service Personal Data edit at /employees/me: add edit affordances for Emergency Contact / Address / Contact Info / Bank / Personal Info sections, wired through Change Request submit flow (approver UI is out-of-scope — delegated to sibling #54)

contextReferences: Prior run #12 (Humi Profile Edit FE E2E) — FileUploadField atom + 15-field form + Zustand pending/attachments + i18n th/en already in repo
Issue #54 (sibling) owns approver-side UI — this issue stubs a mock-submit hook that #54 later wires
memory/feedback_thai_address_8_fields_structured.md — Thai address = 8 structured fields, not textarea
memory/feedback_duplicate_data_two_formats_one_chip.md — avoid duplicate metric chips; one canonical display
memory/feedback_zustand_persist_version_migrate.md — nested slice shape change requires bump `version: N` + `migrate()`
expertise: AttachmentDropzone is the canonical atom for any attachment upload
existingPatterns: Change Request locale keys already exist in messages/th.json + en.json (changeRequests / workflows nav slot)
Humi primitives (Button, Card, FormField) live under @/components/humi
Zustand store pattern for profile draft persist — see existing profile-edit work from #12
existingDependencies: zustand@4 (persist middleware, must bump version on shape change)

constraints: C1 surgical — reuse existing /employees/me page scaffold; ADD edit affordances and CR submit flow; do NOT rebuild the read view
C3 simplicity — one shared ChangeRequestSubmitModal, not five per-section modals; one shared pending-state chip component
C7 SSoT — every section reads/writes via the profile Zustand store; no parallel state for same fields
C10 — all labels Thai-primary; no SF-style bilingual parens; locale codes (TH)/(EN) allowed only where field is genuinely locale-tagged
Rule 22 — max ~8 files per agent; split into 2 parallel builders if scope exceeds (Section UI + CR plumbing)
Approver UI is OUT OF SCOPE — this issue submits to a mock approval endpoint; #54 will replace the mock
No backend persistence required for this issue — Zustand draft persist + mock fetch for CR submit
AttachmentDropzone required for any attachment field (marriage cert, address proof) — never raw <input type=file>

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-1: Emergency Contact section at /employees/me shows edit button; clicking opens editable form with name, relation (lookup), phone (multi-value per #48 SF parity); supports add/remove contact rows; validates non-empty name + valid phone before enabling submit

AC-2: Address section edit form exposes 8 structured Thai fields (houseNo, village, soi, road, subdistrict, district, province, postalCode); province + district + subdistrict are cascading lookups; saving does NOT mutate master — it queues a Change Request
AC-3: Contact Info section supports multi-value phone + email arrays (one primary flag per array); labels Thai-only; remove button disabled when only one row remains and that row is flagged primary
acceptanceCriteria.rule: #53 section 3 + memory #48 SF parity multi-contact pattern

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-4: Bank / Payment Method edit exposes bank code (lookup from existing BANK picklist), account number (digits only, 10-12 length), account holder name (defaults to employee name, editable); attaches optional bank book image via AttachmentDropzone
AC-5: Personal Info edit covers marital status (lookup MARITAL), children count (integer ≥ 0), spouse name (required when marital=married); changes to marital status prompt for effective date

AC-6: Each section's 'บันทึก' (save) action opens the shared ChangeRequestSubmitModal with effective date picker (defaults to today, disallows past dates), optional note textarea, and summary of diff (before → after); confirm posts to mock CR endpoint and returns a pending CR id
acceptanceCriteria.rule: BRD SH6-SH8 (submit → approve → apply with effective date)

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-7: Section card shows a pending-state chip (Thai label 'รอการอนุมัติ') when a pending CR exists for that section; user cannot open the edit form while a pending CR for the same section is active; clicking the chip reveals pending CR details + cancel action
acceptanceCriteria.rule: #53 workflow + invariant: one pending CR per section at a time

acceptanceCriteria.text: AC-8: Zustand profile-edit draft store persists across tab reloads with explicit `version: N+1` bump + `migrate()` function; opening a section that had a draft restores the in-progress edit
AC-9: C10 language gate — every new label / toast / chip text is Thai; pre-commit grep gate over new files in src/frontend/ finds zero SF-paren or em-dash bilingual duplicates

AC-10: Vitest + Testing Library tests cover AC-1..AC-8 at minimum one passing test per AC; i18n smoke test asserts no missing TH key in the new strings; all suite green (0 fail, 0 unintended skip) via `bun run test`

exitConditions.description: GH issue #53 closed with Phase 5b PASS comment

inScope: 5 editable sections at /employees/me (Emergency Contact / Address / Contact Info / Bank / Personal Info)
Shared ChangeRequestSubmitModal with effective date picker, diff summary, note field
Zustand profile-edit store with version+migrate persist
AttachmentDropzone wiring for bank book image
i18n keys for new labels (th + en)
Mock CR submit endpoint (fetch wrapper returning a fake id)
outOfScope: Approver UI and approval decision flow — owned by sibling issue #54
Real backend persistence / Prisma migrations — mock endpoint only
Notifications to approver (push / email) — #54 or later
Bulk edit across employees — not ESS
HR admin override of pending CR — not ESS
Profile photo + name change — handled by separate flow (different BRD)
Document viewer / download of attached bank book — read-only view is #54

systemInvariants: All personal-data edits route through a Change Request — no direct mutation of the employee master record (BRD SH6-SH8)
A Change Request carries an effective date; the change applies on the effective date, not on the approval timestamp
At most one pending CR per (employee, section) at any time — UI must block a second edit while one is pending
User can cancel their own pending CR; user cannot cancel another user's CR
Zustand persist shape change requires both `version` bump and a `migrate()` path — silent shape drift = hydration crash (from feedback memory)
Every user-facing string in new code is Thai-primary; bilingual duplicates or SF-style parens fail the C10 pre-commit gate
Every attachment field uses AttachmentDropzone — no raw <input type=file> in new code (per mk3-builder expertise pattern)
